perspectives.label: v2-maven-reactor
perspectives.description: Direct v2 module DAG for the publishable jpa-rsql-search reactor.

groups.label: api
groups.description: Stable public definitions, request value objects, policy types, and API-level RSQL operator names.

groups.label: rsql-spi
groups.description: Neutral RSQL AST, parser, operator metadata, backend contracts, and JPA binding SPI.

groups.label: core
groups.description: Search compiler, protection guards, RSQL engine orchestration, and runtime validation failures.

groups.label: jpa-validation
groups.description: JPA metamodel validation over compiled search definitions.

groups.label: perplexhub
groups.description: Perplexhub backend adapter and convenience engine builders.

groups.label: spring-boot-starter
groups.description: Spring Boot autoconfiguration and the recommended application entry point.

constraints.message: The v2 API is the bottom of the public DAG: it may be consumed by every publishable module, but it must not consume implementation modules.
The neutral RSQL SPI may be used only by the core engine, concrete backends, and the Spring Boot starter.
Core owns compilation and protection logic; only validation, backend convenience, and starter modules may depend on it.
JPA validation is an optional runtime validator and should only be assembled by the starter.
Perplexhub is an optional backend adapter and should only be assembled by the starter.
The Spring Boot starter is the application entry point; lower-level library modules must not depend on autoconfiguration.
Production code must not depend on test fixtures, integration consumers, or verification-only sources.
